title: Care Bundle Detail
description: This page shows per-measure performance for a single care bundle against a selected data source. Each FHIR eCQM measure displays its numerator and denominator counts, performance rate, and 95% confidence interval. Stratifications break down rates by age group, sex, or payer.
tips: Switch data sources using the dropdown at the top right. Sources labelled ⚠ are below the 100,000-patient threshold and are for research use only.
Click the chevron next to any measure to expand its stratifications (age band, sex, payer).
Click the info icon (ℹ) to open the FHIR Measure methodology panel — this shows measure logic, population criteria, and data requirements.
Click 'Materialize' to run this bundle against the selected source. Runs are queued and results appear within minutes.
Use 'Compare sources' to open a side-by-side view of the same measures across all qualifying sources.
Download the FHIR R4 Measure resource (JSON) to share the measure definition or import it into another FHIR-enabled system.
